news.t: VistaShares BitBonds™ 5 Yr Enhanced Weekly Option Income ETF (BTYB) to Close
VistaShares Creates Entirely New Category of ETF with Launch of BTYB, Seeking to Provide 2X the Yield of Treasuries, Weekly Distributions and Exposure to Bitcoin Price Moves

overview.description: The VistaShares BitBonds 5 Yr Enhanced Weekly Distribution ETF (BTYB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund actively manages a combined portfolio of US Treasuries with intermediate maturities and an options-based strategy linked to Bitcoin (BTC) ETPs. The fund seeks to generate weekly income and capital appreciation. BTYB was launched on Feb 3, 2026 and is issued by VistaShares.
